archived_tasks.title: Group A - Project Setup & CLI Foundation
archived_tasks.description: Python project initialization with uv, Typer CLI scaffold, basic smoke tests, and project structure (22 subtasks)

objective.statement: Establish the Python project foundation: uv-managed skeleton, Presidio+spaCy detection core, and SQLite findings storage — all verified by passing smoke tests.
successCriteria: uv run scanmenow --help exits 0 with Typer help text
Presidio Analyzer detects EMAIL_ADDRESS in sample text
Presidio Anonymizer redacts EMAIL_ADDRESS in sample text
spaCy en_core_web_lg loads and detects a PERSON entity
SQLite DB initializes, CRUD round-trips findings, CSV export produces correct output

review_summary.final_verdict: APPROVE — all findings resolved before merge
